title: CreativeTools
description: CreativeTools is an in-development creative mod made to make it easier for users. Remember, it doesn't have many features for now, but we keep improving and adding new stuff!
body:
📥 Installation Guide

Follow the steps below to install CreativeTools Mod:

1. **Installation Instructions**:
   - CreativeTools is a Minecraft mod and requires Forge or Fabric Loader.
   - If you are using a third-party launcher, it probably has a built-in function to automatically install mod loaders.
   - Download the mod and place it in your `mods` folder. Restart the launcher and make sure the mod is installed.

2. **Mod Features**:
   - **One-Hit-All Sword**: A special sword that kills all beings in the game in one hit.
   - **Ametist Set**: Armor and tool set made of amethyst materials.
   - **Two Types of TNT**: Two new types of TNT with different explosive properties.
   - **Music Disk**: Play a new piece of music in the game with a special music disk.
   - **Features in Development**: New biomes, spells and LootTables.

3. **Compatibility and Performance**:
   - The mod is compatible with Minecraft version 1.20.1. To make sure you have installed the mod correctly, you should see the CreativeTools mod in the “Mods” menu when you start Minecraft.
   - It is recommended that you use an up-to-date version of Minecraft and a compatible mod installer for the mod to work properly.

4. **Troubleshooting**:
   - If the mod is not working or you are experiencing errors, make sure that the mods you have installed and their version compatibility are correct.
   - Check the error logs in the `logs` folder in your Minecraft game folder and look for related error messages.
   - For support, you can contact the help section on the mod's official page or forums.

5. **Frequently Asked Questions**:
   - How do updates work?
     - When new updates are released, simply delete the current mod file from your `mods` folder, download the new version and place it in the same folder.
   - How is the mod compatible with other mods?
     - CreativeTools is generally compatible with other mods, but there may be conflicts with some mods. If you experience any compatibility issues, you can report them to the mod maker.

CreativeTools mod is designed to make the game more fun and diverse for players playing in creative mode. Take your gaming experience to the next level with new features and improvements!
